rules.action: Monitor reservoir levels. Prepare gate crew for potential discharge. No gate opening required at this stage.
Partial discharge required. Open Gate 2 at 30% capacity. Notify downstream communities via district collector.
Full discharge required. Open Gate 2 and Gate 4 immediately. Issue public downstream alert. Notify NDRF.
EMERGENCY RELEASE. Open ALL GATES immediately. Evacuate all downstream zones. This is a life-safety emergency.

ndrf_staging.source: NDRF District Staging Protocol, Godavari Basin

rules.action: Alert NDRF District Unit. Prepare staging equipment. No deployment required — monitoring phase.
Pre-position Team Alpha at coordinates (17.3850, 81.7938) — Zone B staging area. IMPORTANT: Access road NH-65 submerges in 2 hours. Deploy BEFORE T+1.5hrs.
rules.access_warning: NH-65 closes T+2hrs. Use SH-41 bridge approach via NH-30. Confirm route availability before dispatch.

rules.action: Pre-position Team Beta at upstream staging point (17.4200, 81.7200). NH-516E closes T+1.5hrs — deploy immediately.
Deploy maritime unit for coastal evacuation — delta zone C. Pre-position lifeboats at Coastal Centre (17.0050, 81.9400).

evacuation.source: NDMA Flood Inundation Map, Godavari District 2023

rules.action: Issue preparedness advisory. Advise residents in flood-prone wards to prepare go-bags and identify nearest relief camp.
Issue mandatory evacuation advisory for Wards 3, 7, 11 (~4,200 residents). Primary evacuation route: NH-30 North. NH-65 closes in 2 hours — begin evacuation immediately.
Mandatory evacuation of all coastal wards. Route: SH-22 (one-way outbound). Maritime evacuation for delta villages accessible only by water.
Hospital Disaster Management Cell to convene. Check backup generator fuel levels. Prepare ground floor patient transfer plan.

Activate backup power now. Move ALL ground floor patients to upper floors/wards. Cancel elective procedures. Contact blood bank for reserves. Expected power grid failure T+5.5hrs — hospital must be on backup by then.
Highway patrol to monitor low-lying stretches. Prepare closure signage and barricades.
Close NH-65 at km marker 34. Deploy barricades on both approaches. Divert all traffic via NH-30 North. Coordinate with police for traffic management.
Pre-check backup connections to Grid 7. Verify Sub-station 4 flood barriers. Fuel all standby generators in flood-risk zone.
Pre-reroute Sub-station 4 supply (40,000 homes) to Grid 7 immediately. Fuel backup generators at District Hospital Y. Sub-station 4 fails at T+5.5hrs — all rerouting must complete before then.

rules.message: No flood risk in your area. Normal monitoring in progress. Check back for updates.
FLOOD WATCH: Your area is under monitoring. Prepare go-bag: medication, documents, 3-day supplies. Identify nearest relief camp.
HIGH FLOOD RISK — YOUR AREA. LEAVE NOW via NH-30 North. NH-65 closes in 2 hours. Take medication, documents, 3 days supplies. Go to Government High School Sector 5.
